assertions.title: Auto-refresh via SSE - Loop state updates reflected in UI without manual refresh when validation completes or assertions change

steps.observed: Page shows blank - no interactive elements
500 Internal Server Error on API calls

evidence.consoleErrors: 500 Internal Server Error on API requests

assertions.issues: Dashboard server is returning 500 Internal Server Error on all API endpoints. The page HTML loads but JavaScript fails to initialize properly due to API failures. Cannot test SSE auto-refresh without a functioning dashboard.

blockers.description: Server returning 500 Internal Server Error on all API endpoints (/api/missions, /api/health). Dashboard UI cannot function without API.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried page load multiple times, reloaded browser session, checked console errors. The 500 errors persist across all API calls.

summary: VAL-UI-012 testing is blocked. The dashboard dev server is returning 500 Internal Server Error on all API endpoints, preventing the UI from loading properly. Cannot test SSE auto-refresh behavior without a functioning dashboard. Screenshots show blank page with no interactive elements despite successful HTML load.
